title: thereianthus minutus
intro: Thereianthus minutus, also known as the miniature daisy or tiny daisy, is a small, annual herb that belongs to the family Iridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Thereianthus minutus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
